note: Provenance manifest for external-validation datasets. No large third-party data is committed. Entries with redistribution_allowed=false must be downloaded by the user from the source; fill sha256 after download and verify with itd_research.io.verify_checksum. Synthetic entries are for code verification and CI only and are NEVER external empirical validation.

datasets.title: Biofilm flow data: time-averaged PIV velocity field of a turbulent boundary layer
datasets.authors: Murphy, Elizabeth A. K.; Barros, Julio M.; Schultz, Michael P.; Flack, Karen A.; Steppe, Cecily N.; Reidenbach, Matthew A.
datasets.institution: United States Naval Academy / University of Virginia
datasets.download_method: python tools/datasets/fetch_dataset.py --id biofilm_piv_boundary_layer --output <dir>; then tools/datasets/convert_mat_piv.py to build the native .npz
datasets.coordinate_system: yx structured grid, dx=dy=0.17654 mm, y increasing from the wall
datasets.time_information: time-averaged mean field (single snapshot); 4000 instantaneous fields available separately (22 GB, not used)
datasets.uncertainty_information: experimental PIV; invalid vectors present as NaN (approx 5.7 percent), handled by the mask policy

datasets.title: Synthetic two-dimensional wind-turbine wake field (streamwise velocity only)
datasets.coordinate_system: 351 x 1001 scalar grid; no coordinates or v-component provided
datasets.uncertainty_information: externally generated synthetic field (velocity deficit over roughness levels); not experimental
datasets.intended_experiment: scalar_field_ingestion_only (single component; NOT usable for velocity-gradient-tensor diagnostics)

datasets.title: Tiny synthetic PIV grid (CI fixture)
datasets.uncertainty_information: none (synthetic); two invalid vectors injected deterministically

datasets.title: JHU Turbulence Database - forced isotropic turbulence (1024^3)
datasets.licence: open for research use; see JHTDB terms and citation policy
datasets.download_method: python tools/datasets/fetch_jhtdb_cutout.py --dataset isotropic1024coarse --origin 200 300 400 --size 32 --output <dir>/jhtdb_iso_32.npz (GetVelocity SOAP, public testing token; raw DNS not redistributed)
datasets.format: GetVelocity point query on native grid nodes -> npz (x,y,z,u,v,w)
datasets.coordinate_system: 32^3 block of native nodes at origin (200,300,400), spacing 2pi/1024, in the periodic box [0,2pi)^3
datasets.uncertainty_information: DNS (numerical); discretisation error documented by JHTDB. Retrieved 32^3 block, component rms 0.5524. Raw DNS is NOT committed (JHTDB terms); reproduce with the fetch tool and verify the sha256 above.

datasets.title: JHU Turbulence Database - turbulent channel flow (Re_tau=1000)
datasets.licence: open for research use; see JHTDB terms and citation policy
datasets.download_method: python tools/datasets/fetch_jhtdb_cutout.py --dataset channel --coords 4.0 -0.95 1.0 --extent 0.4 0.4 0.4 --shape 20 20 20 --spatial Lag6 --output <dir>/chan_wall.npz (near-wall); --coords 4.0 -0.2 1.0 for the core block
datasets.format: GetVelocity Lag6 interpolation on a physical block -> npz (x,y,z,u,v,w)
datasets.coordinate_system: 20^3 physical blocks; near-wall y in [-0.95,-0.55] (y+ ~ 50-450) and core y in [-0.2,0.2]; x in [0,8pi], z in [0,3pi]
datasets.uncertainty_information: DNS (numerical). Two blocks retrieved: near-wall (sha256 above, rms 0.5489) and core (sha256 713516125acc5366e8e585d217edbc2355323cd86c34ca08a1a8560feed10c18, rms 0.6556). Raw DNS not committed (JHTDB terms).
datasets.intended_experiment: channel_flow_3d (anisotropic wall-bounded; broadens the 3D candidate beyond isotropic)

datasets.title: JHU Turbulence Database - transitional flat-plate boundary layer
datasets.licence: open for research use; see JHTDB terms and citation policy
datasets.download_method: python tools/datasets/fetch_jhtdb_cutout.py --dataset transition_bl --coords <x> 0.6 100.0 --extent 4.0 5.0 6.0 --shape 12 16 14 --spatial Lag4 --output <dir>/s_<x>.npz  (repeat for x in 45,100,150,200,250,300,400,550,750,900)
datasets.format: GetVelocity Lag4 interpolation on a physical block per station -> npz (x,y,z,u,v,w)
datasets.coordinate_system: streamwise stations x in [45,900] (domain x in [30.2,1000]); each a 12x16x14 block at y in [0.6,5.6], z in [100,106]; Lag4 (wall stencil forbids Lag6 near the wall)
datasets.time_information: time-resolved; transition is spatial (streamwise) and shows temporal intermittency at a fixed station (pass --time to the fetch tool). Streamwise scan at t=0; temporal scan at x=270 over t=0..70.
datasets.uncertainty_information: DNS (numerical). Ten streamwise stations (t=0) plus temporal sequences at x=350 and x=270; per-query sha256 varies (not listed). Raw DNS not committed (JHTDB terms). Transition onset near x~250; a turbulent spot passes x=270 near t~30.
datasets.intended_experiment: transition_detection_3d (laminar-to-turbulent in space and time; externally characterised transition for H2)

datasets.title: PIV Challenge reference cases (candidate)
datasets.licence: per PIV Challenge terms (check before redistribution)
datasets.download_method: download from pivchallenge.org (user-run); select a vortical case
